# Release Notes v0.1.2

codexBot v0.1.2 upgrades QQ conversations into a thread-based console workflow.

## Highlights

- QQ messages are aggregated by `channelType + chatId`
- Conversation API returns thread-level items
- Message API supports `threadKey` for merged thread history
- Left sidebar thread list with fixed right-side detail panel
- Added archive summary and operation manual for this delivery

## Notes

- Pure Web edition only
- Best suited for QQ bridge + local Codex monitor workflows
- Runtime config remains outside the repository
